name: spring-stack-shuffle
title: Spring Stack Shuffle
description: A stack of 3 to 5 slotted cards reshuffles on cues: the back card throws over the top and lands at the front with real mass, the rest compress and resettle; cues that land mid-flight redirect the moving cards with velocity preserved.
evidence: Wave K K7: interruptible-spring stack from the X expert study demand slate; L1 redirect authored into the default cue rhythm

variables.label: Cards
variables.description: Number of cards in the stack, 3 to 5.

variables.label: Shuffle cues
variables.description: Comma-separated seconds from mount start; each cue throws the back card to the front. Cues inside a running throw redirect it mid-flight, velocity preserved. Empty keeps the default rhythm.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Active-card ring color from the contract token map.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the settled stack holds until the frame cuts.
